CustomField.description: When non-null, the Close Outs queue card is hidden from the Delivery Hub app Home page (it still shows on the workspace "Close Outs" tab). Null = shown (default). Inverted-name field (Hide, not Show) so the safe posture is the default null state, mirroring the home-visibility convention.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set to a date/time to hide the Close Outs card on the Home page. Leave blank to show it.
CustomField.label: Hide Home Close Out Queue
